falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4000 (key support level) on 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breakdown below critical support invalidates the bottom pattern and suggests continued bearish momentum, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% with a 200-basis-point move within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained bond yield surge indicates aggressive risk-off sentiment, directly opposing the implied market bottom scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: US Non-Farm Payrolls report a loss of ≥500k jobs in the latest monthly print
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Catastrophic employment data would trigger immediate market panic, invalidating the pattern and proving the current verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
